articles.title: GameStop Completes $1.5 Billion Offering to Fund Bitcoin Reserve
articles.description: Video game retailer GameStop has nearly $1. 5 billion to start buying Bitcoin for its treasury after completing its convertible notes sale.

articles.title: Ethereum Surpasses Solana to Lead DEX Volume with $63 Billion in March 2025, Despite 8% Market Share and 18% Price Drop
articles.description: Ethereum has reclaimed its position as the leading blockchain for decentralized exchange (DEX) trading volume, surpassing Solana for the first time since September 2024

articles.title: Blockchain Association CEO will move to Solana advocacy group
articles.description: Kristin Smith, CEO of the US-based Blockchain Association, will be leaving the cryptocurrency advocacy group for the recently launched Solana Policy Institute. In an April 1 notice, the Blockchain Association (BA) said Smith would be stepping down from her role as CEO on May 16. According to the association, the soon-to-be former CEO will become president of the Solana Policy Institute on May 19. The association’s notice did not provide an apparent reason for the move to the Solana advocacy orga

articles.title: Ethereum prints 4 consecutive red monthly candles, but data points to an ETH/BTC bottom
articles.description: Ethereum’s native token, Ether (ETH), registered four consecutive red monthly candles after the altcoin dropped 18. 47% in March. The altcoin’s current market structure reflects a sustained bearish trend not seen since the bear market of 2022. With each monthly close taking place below the previous month’s low, analysts are beginning the debate about whether ETH is approaching a bottom or if there is more downside ahead for the altcoin

articles.description: Let's see what crypto news the last day of March brought with U. Today's digest!

articles.title: Grayscale files S-3 to turn Bitcoin, Ether, XRP, and ADA large cap fund into a spot ETF
articles.description: American digital assets giant Grayscale has submitted an application to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to convert its Digital Large Cap Fund into a spot exchange-traded product (ETF). articles.title: Binance ends Tether USDT trading in Europe to comply with MiCA rules
articles.description: Binance has discontinued spot trading pairs with Tether’s USDt in the European Economic Area (EEA) to comply with the Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA). Cryptocurrency exchange Binance has delisted spot trading pairs with several non-MiCA-compliant tokens in the EEA in line with a plan disclosed in early March, Cointelegraph has learned.
